rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §29.010 governs TEA monitoring of school district special education compliance. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisals and is unrelated to this special education oversight provision.
quote: The agency shall develop and implement a comprehensive system for monitoring school district compliance with federal and state laws relating to special education.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no cross-reference or interaction exists between the two provisions.
